message:
Improve web UI accessibility, memoization, and React lint compliance

DataTable:
- Change outer wrapper from div[role=region] to semantic <section>
  element for better screen reader navigation
- Extract inline event handlers in DataTableCards to named const
  functions, avoiding re-creation on every render
- Replace array-index keys in DataTableEmpty skeleton rows/cols with
  stable string keys to prevent unnecessary reconciliation

Hooks:
- Wrap useKeyboardShortcuts default shortcuts array in useMemo with
  proper dependencies to prevent effect re-registration on every render
- Wrap merged allShortcuts in useMemo to stabilize the reference
- Remove dead _widgetConfigStr computation in useDashboard
- Prefix unused destructured key variable with underscore in useLogParser

Components:
- Remove unused Lucide icon imports (Cpu, Mail, Terminal) from
  SnapshotSummaryPanel

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
